response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Vocal audio phonetically matches the provided song lyrics in the Reference JSON. 2. JSON Usage: The Reference JSON was fully utilized for the song performance ('The Everlasting Guilty Crown'); manual transcription was performed for the English banter and the on-screen technical glitch text. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely anchored to vocal bursts. Rapid-fire banter was segmented using instantaneous transitions and aggressive end-time truncation to prevent cascading delays and maintain readability.

subtitles.original: この歌が聴こえてる
subtitles.english: If you can hear this song,

subtitles.original: 生命ある全ての者よ
subtitles.english: it's for you, each and every one of you,

subtitles.original: 真実はあなたの
subtitles.english: The truth is...

subtitles.original: 胸の中にある
subtitles.english: ...inside you all.

subtitles.original: 嵐の海は静まった
subtitles.english: The ocean's storms have quieted,

subtitles.original: 失ったものは数えきれなくとも
subtitles.english: but we've lost more people than we can count.

subtitles.original: この歌が聴こえてる
subtitles.english: If you can hear this song,

subtitles.original: 世界中の寄る辺なき者よ
subtitles.english: if you have nowhere to go,

subtitles.original: 希望はあなたの
subtitles.english: Hope is...

subtitles.original: 胸の中にある
subtitles.english: ...inside you all.

subtitles.original: 悲しみの夜を超える時
subtitles.english: Even if we're past the night of sadness,

subtitles.original: 必ずあなたは生きていく強さを
subtitles.english: you will get the strength to live on,

subtitles.original: 持てるから
subtitles.english: because you can.
